channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Whole road is flooded, 2nd June
item.description:
The drains in the vicinity of 63 Queens Road are all blocked and the road is completely flooded

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 37, Eldorado Road, Warden Hill, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing Bin, 2nd June
item.description:
The bin at ///balconies.football.sensibly is overflowing - rubbish on the football pitches. Note - I saw this yesterday (1/6/26) so it may already have been emptied.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Innsworth Lane, Longlevens, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 2nd June
item.description:
Overgrown tree. Please cut back low hanging branches 10m Standard TM with temp FW closure (Overgrown Tree)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Drain blocked in front of 137 and 139 Village Road, GL510AE, 2nd June
item.description:
Drain blocked in front of 137 and 139 Village Road, GL510AE

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 8, Village Road, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Footways Slabs problem, 2nd June
item.description:

item.title: Rain water unable to clear, 2nd June
item.description:
Outside The Nest. Drain is blocked with large quantity of mud and debris so rain water unable so soak away. Running down road/ pavement.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Battledown Approach, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Grass completely obscuring chicanes, I’m in a high car and it’s impossible to see what’s coming, there’s likely to be a head-on crash., 2nd June
item.description:
Gotherington lane, the chicanes. It’s imperative that the grass is cut before a serious accident.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gotherington Lane, Bishop's Cleeve, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unreadable signpost, 2nd June
item.description:
The corner of Eldersfield Close where the signpost is located - it is very old and unreadable
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Eldersfield Close, Winchcombe, Winchcombe, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pointless Temporary traffic lights!, 2nd June
item.description:
Temporary traffic lights have been dumped in this section of road as an attempt to avoid fixing the road, there are no signs of work being carried out, no contact details. This has been done to avoid fixing the shocking state of the road! Fix the road or remove the temp lights which have no legal reason to be here!!!!!
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hayden Road, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Information board identifying emergency contact company/number not displayed
